description_long: This is a classic upright Neo Geo arcade game cabinet, featuring a bold red and black color scheme with prominent branding and game artwork. The front panel displays a large screen with a fighting game in progress, flanked by a control panel equipped with multiple colored buttons and joysticks for two players. Above the screen, a marquee showcases vibrant game artwork and the Neo Geo logo, while the lower section houses a coin slot and access panel. The side panels are decorated with dynamic diagonal white stripes, the Neo Geo and SNK logos, and additional branding, giving the cabinet a striking, retro appearance. The back panel is mostly plain black with a large Neo Geo logo and SNK branding. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood and metal, with a glossy finish on the exterior surfaces.
description: A vibrant Neo Geo arcade game cabinet with red and black panels, bold branding, a large screen, and a detailed control panel for two players.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with joysticks and buttons, coin slot, and marquee artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red panel with white stripes, Neo Geo and SNK branding, and the angled cabinet profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with a large Neo Geo logo and SNK branding, no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same red and white striped graphics and branding.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged side-by-side for two players, with a red and white color scheme and game-specific markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features vibrant artwork with the Neo Geo logo, game imagery, and a red background, matching the overall cabinet theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Red panels with dynamic diagonal white stripes, large Neo Geo and SNK logos, and the MVS branding, creating a bold and energetic visual theme.
